items.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
items.summary: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

items.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
items.summary: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.

items.title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
items.summary: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

items.title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
items.summary: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

items.title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop
items.summary: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.

items.title: Anthropic CPO leaves Figma’s board after reports he will offer a competing product
items.summary: Krieger's departure and any forthcoming design tools will be another data point for investors who fear the SaaSpocalypse — that the largest AI labs will come to dominate software businesses, a thesis that has rocked pub…

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: AI Mode in Chrome

items.title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode
items.summary: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the web page side-by-side with AI Mode.

items.title: InsightFinder raises $15M to help companies figure out where AI agents go wrong
items.summary: According to CEO Helen Gu, the biggest problem facing the industry today is not just monitoring and diagnosing where AI models go wrong — it's also diagnosing how the entire tech stack operates now that AI is part of it.

items.title: AI traffic to US retailers rose 393% in Q1, and it’s boosting their revenue too
items.summary: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Example images made with Personal Intelligence

items.title: Roblox’s AI assistant gets new agentic tools to plan, build, and test games
items.summary: The new tools are designed to help creators throughout the entire development process.

items.title: Google is now targeting bad ads over bad actors
items.summary: Google blocked 8.3 billion ads in 2025 but suspended fewer advertisers.

items.title: Runway CEO says AI could help Hollywood make 50 films instead of one $100M blockbuster
items.summary: Runway’s CEO says AI could help studios make dozens of films for the cost of one, betting volume will boost hit-making odds.

items.title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage
items.summary: Starting April 19, the price of the Meta Quest 3S (128GB) and Meta Quest 3S (256GB) will go up by $50 to $349.99 and $449.99, respectively. The price of the Meta Quest 3 is going up by $100 to $599.99.

items.title: Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
items.summary: The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.

items.title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
items.summary: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. At the same time, government institutions face distinct constraints around security, governance, and ope…

items.title: Treating enterprise AI as an operating layer
items.summary: There’s a fault line running through enterprise AI, and it’s not the one getting the most attention. The public conversation still tracks foundation models and benchmarks—GPT versus Gemini, reasoning scores, and margina…

items.title: This simulation startup wants to be the Cursor for physical AI
items.summary: Antioch raised an $8.5 million seed round to create simulation tools for a new generation of robot builders.

items.title: Why having “humans in the loop” in an AI war is an illusion
items.summary: The availability of artificial intelligence for use in warfare is at the center of a legal battle between Anthropic and the Pentagon. This debate has become urgent, with AI playing a bigger role than ever before in the…

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.

items.title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
items.summary: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams.

items.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.

items.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
items.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
